w32 00010118 2C090000
w32 0001011C 4182000C

w32 00010124 91090018

w32 001F9770 4BE16990

mode: once
w32 000CE7EC 60000000

mode: once

aob 386000004E800020F821FF917C0802A6F8010080808300008084003C 386000014E800020F821FF917C0802A6F8010080808300008084003C
